title: hydrocotyle scutellifera
intro: Hydrocotyle scutellifera, also known as Gotu Kola, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the pennywort family, native to Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Gotu Kola include improved cognitive function, reduced stress and anxiety, and enhanced wound healing, as well as its potential to prevent or treat conditions such as Alzheimer's disease and skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of Gotu Kola include teas, capsules, and extracts that can be consumed orally, as well as topical creams and ointments used to treat skin conditions.
